summary.conclusion: Fixed-time CMT50 failures were dominated by timeout-before-final-answer behavior, while no-answer-timeout probes show JSON emission can recover but answer accuracy remains poor.
notes: Original fixed-time run emitted parseable JSON for 1 of 50 items.
No-answer-timeout probes emitted parseable JSON for 3 of 3 tested items.
No-answer-timeout probes passed 0 of 3 tested items.

probes.name: json_smoke_test
probes.interpretation: Kimi CLI stdout path works for final answers

probes.name: item_1_120s
probes.changed_variable: timeout raised from 45 s to 120 s
probes.result: stdout remained empty while stderr grew
probes.interpretation: item 1 was not just a short-timeout artifact

probes.name: 300s_slice
probes.result: some items emitted JSON, some still did not, emitted answers were wrong
probes.interpretation: longer time improves emission but not correctness

probes.name: no_answer_timeout_slice
probes.changed_variable: fixed answer timeout removed; idle-output guard retained
probes.result: items 1, 14, and 37 emitted JSON but all failed
probes.interpretation: answer accuracy must be tracked separately from JSON emission

items.observed_failure: Fixed-time runs failed to emit stdout JSON; no-answer-timeout run emitted JSON but answer was wrong.
items.root_cause_hypothesis: Kimi eventually converges to a plausible CDW energy expression, but not the benchmark key.
items.recommended_action: Inspect source row and gold rationale before using this item for agent-design conclusions.
items.retest_plan: Rerun after source/gold inspection with a rationale-constrained prompt.

items.observed_failure: No-answer-timeout run emitted parseable JSON but selected only b instead of d;e.
items.root_cause_hypothesis: Kimi focused on the missing baseline argument and missed the support-mismatch choices expected by the benchmark.
items.recommended_action: Add a method-specific VMC support-condition probe.
items.retest_plan: Run item 14 plus a simplified VMC estimator probe after prompt changes.

items.observed_failure: Kimi emitted b;c;d, while local gold expects g.
items.root_cause_hypothesis: Kimi follows a standard PEPS/CFT transfer-matrix procedure; source option text may be noisy and needs inspection.
items.recommended_action: Inspect original item options and mark ambiguous if the source label is inconsistent.

items.observed_failure: 300 s diagnostic run did not emit stdout JSON.
items.root_cause_hypothesis: ASCII/graph reasoning triggered prolonged unresolved deliberation.
items.recommended_action: Run item 50 with the no-answer-timeout harness only if needed; otherwise keep it as a nontermination probe.
items.retest_plan: Use idle-output guard and compare JSON emission with an answer-forcing prompt.

recommended_iterations.action: Record stdout bytes, stderr bytes, captured_json, runtime, and idle timing in every benchmark run.
recommended_iterations.why: Aggregate scores hide whether failures are empty-output, malformed-output, or wrong-answer failures.
recommended_iterations.retest: Run a 3-item slice and confirm attribution fields are populated.

recommended_iterations.action: Compare fixed-time, no-answer-timeout, and answer-forcing prompts on the same small slice.
recommended_iterations.why: Kimi can eventually emit JSON on some items, but the convergence time is long.
recommended_iterations.retest: Use items 1, 14, 37, and 50 as the diagnostic slice.

recommended_iterations.action: Add method-specific probes and source/gold audits before changing agent reasoning policy.
recommended_iterations.why: No-answer-timeout recovered JSON emission but still scored 0/3.
recommended_iterations.retest: Rerun audited items with unchanged verifier.
